title: Zig RMSNorm SIMD kernel
description:
Implement SIMD-vectorized RMS normalization in zig/src/ops/rmsnorm.zig.

Formula: output = x * rsqrt(mean(x²) + eps) * gamma
No mean subtraction (unlike LayerNorm).

MUST include:
- SIMD vectorized implementation using NEON intrinsics (squared-sum reduction + element-wise multiply)
- Scalar reference implementation for benchmark comparison
- Proper handling of edge cases: all-zeros input (no crash), constant input, large values

Tests (mandatory):
- zig/tests/test_rmsnorm.zig: Correctness vs scalar for shapes [64,256], [32,1024], [1,4096]. Output norm ~1.0. Special cases. Compare to LayerNorm output to verify they differ.
- zig/tests/bench_rmsnorm.zig: SIMD vs scalar on [64,1024], 200 iterations.

Pass/fail:
- All correctness tests pass (max relative error <= 1e-5)
- SIMD >= 4x throughput vs scalar
- No inf/nan for inputs in [-1000, 1000]
- Differs from LayerNorm output

Register the new file in zig/build.zig so tests and benchmarks compile.
